const PropsDemo = $props((props) => { let count = $state(props.count); return { template: `

Hello, {props.name}!

Count: {count}

{#if props.showDetails}

Name is {props.name}

Count is {props.count}

ShowDetails is {props.showDetails}

{/if}
` }; });
